flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Weatherford College rose 43% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.7k → $5.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Weatherford College rose 43% between 2007 and 2009 ($3.5k → $5.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Weatherford College rose 39% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.8k → $10.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Weatherford College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.0k vs 5.0k).
